offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual revenue recognition causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
problem: Manual revenue recognition processes lead to delays in financial reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Etsy sellers seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try revenue recognition report templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
CSV import for existing sales data
One-click export of simple financial reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
